sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI ITRA 292 of 2019 _______________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge. 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on CMA No.435/2019 3. For hearing of main case 06.11.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the applicant Under instructions learned counsel for the applicant does not press this reference application which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
